title: Incident Record Schema Model
description: Incident Record Schema defining the canonical structure for all incident records in the system.

fields.name: severity
fields.purpose: Incident severity level: critical | high | medium | low

fields.name: status
fields.purpose: Incident lifecycle status: detected | acknowledged | investigating | resolved | closed

fields.name: signal_refs
fields.purpose: References to associated health signal IDs

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No runtime execution.
